displayTitle: Kanan 5: The Last Padawan, Part V: Release
synopsis:
On Lahn, Captain Styles hands the captured Caleb Dume over to Commander Grey for execution, releasing Janus Kasmir and Kleeve. Aboard a *Gozanti*-class cruiser bound for Kaller, Caleb argues that it was the clones who betrayed the Jedi, and that Palpatine used them to destroy the Order and build his Empire, planting doubt in Grey. As they enter Kalleran space, Caleb uses the Force to hurl the stormtroopers aside just as Kasmir's *Kasmiri* and Kleeve's *Escape* attack the cruiser. Caleb is swept into space and rescued by Kasmir.

As the freighter fights back, Grey, wracked with guilt over killing Master Depa Billaba under Order 66, turns his blaster on the bridge crew, dropping the ship's shields so Kasmir and Kleeve can destroy it. Grey and Styles die, leaving Caleb to grapple with the loss of his former friends.

Back on Kaller, Caleb ends his partnership with Kasmir, taking the *Escape* for himself. Reclaiming his master's holocron and lightsaber, he declares that Caleb Dume died with Depa Billaba and flies off under a new name, Kanan Jarrus. He travels to Moraga, where he meets Morfizo. In the present Imperial era, aboard the *Ghost*, Hera Syndulla asks Kanan whether he has ever been to Kaller, and he lies that he never has.
title: Kanan 5: The Last Padawan, Part V: Release
